summary: UX Features Testing - Iteration 21. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all requested UX improvements are working correctly.

health_scores_endpoint_routing.issue: /api/hens/health-scores returned 404 because it was defined after /api/hens/{hen_id} route
health_scores_endpoint_routing.fix: Moved the /api/hens/health-scores route definition before /api/hens/{hen_id} in server.py

backend: Monthly statistics with daily breakdown - WORKING
frontend_ui: Clickable egg card with TAP+1 indicator - VERIFIED
Streak badge on egg card (🥚 1 dagar) - VERIFIED
Undo toast after egg registration (+1 ägg registrerat) - VERIFIED
Statistics bar graph with improved heights - VERIFIED
Filter buttons (7 days / 30 days) in Egg Log - VERIFIED
Hen Health Score badge (70) on hen card - VERIFIED
Mark as seen today button - VERIFIED
Health Score Modal with breakdown - VERIFIED
Net result card colored based on profit/loss - VERIFIED

critical_code_review_comments: Route order issue fixed in server.py - static routes like /hens/health-scores must be defined before parametric routes like /hens/{hen_id}
All interactive elements properly respond to clicks
API integrations working correctly between frontend and backend
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test hen (TestHöna) for health score testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UX features from the product plan verified working. Health scores endpoint required routing fix. Test user nativetest@test.com has 1 hen (TestHöna) and eggs registered for testing.
